headline: Why Verizon (VZ) Shares Are Trading Lower Today
summary: Shares of telecommunications giant Verizon (NYSE:VZ) fell 5.3% in the afternoon session after it was officially removed from the Dow Jones Industrial Average. VZ was replaced by Alphabet ending a decades-long membership.

content.title: Why Verizon (VZ) Shares Are Trading Lower Today
content.summary: Shares of telecommunications giant Verizon (NYSE:VZ) fell 5.3% in the afternoon session after it was officially removed from the Dow Jones Industrial Average. VZ was replaced by Alphabet ending a decades-long membership.

headline: Why Alphabet (GOOGL) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of online advertising giant Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOGL) jumped 5% in the afternoon session after the company's shares officially debuted in the Dow Jones Industrial Average taking the slot vacated by Verizon.

content.title: Why Alphabet (GOOGL) Stock Is Trading Up Today
content.summary: Shares of online advertising giant Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOGL) jumped 5% in the afternoon session after the company's shares officially debuted in the Dow Jones Industrial Average taking the slot vacated by Verizon.

headline: These 5 Passive Income Stocks Could Pay You For Life
summary: Earned income demands your time. Passive income asks only that you stay invested. Dividend stocks remain the cornerstone of retirement portfolios because a check that arrives whether you worked Monday or not feels fundamentally different from a paycheck. Real estate offers similar cash flow but locks capital behind tenants, repairs, and illiquid mortgages. Dividend stocks ... These 5 Passive Income Stocks Could Pay You For Life

headline: Wall Street’s Blue-Chip Index Just Cast Out Verizon for a Higher-Risk AI Growth Machine
summary: Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOGL) and Verizon (NYSE:VZ) just delivered Q1 2026 results that reveal why S&P Dow Jones Indices swapped the telecom giant out of the Dow for the search and cloud heavyweight. Alphabet is pouring cash into AI infrastructure at a historic scale. Verizon is leaning on a customer turnaround and a freshly integrated fiber footprint. ...
